201.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'None of you should say "my soul is foul" but rather say "my soul is unsettled."'
201.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jangan ada di antara kalian yang berkata "jiwaku keji" tetapi katakanlah "jiwaku tidak tenang."'

202.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'There is no good in the gathering of women except in a mosque or at a funeral.'
202.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada kebaikan dalam perkumpulan wanita kecuali di masjid atau di pemakaman.'

203.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'When the last ten days of Ramadan remained, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would tighten his waist wrapper and keep away from his wives.'
203.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika sepuluh hari terakhir Ramadan tersisa, Rasulullah ﷺ mengencangkan kain pinggangnya dan menjauh dari istri-istrinya.'

204.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked about major impurity on garments. She said: 'I used to scrape the semen off the garment of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.'
204.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya tentang najis janabah pada pakaian. Ia berkata: 'Aku biasa menggosok mani dari pakaian Rasulullah ﷺ.'

205.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Do you know who will be the first to reach the shade of Allah on the Day of Resurrection?' They said: 'Allah and His Messenger know best.' He said: 'Those who, when given their rights, accept them; when asked for rights, give them; and who judge for others as they judge for themselves.'
205.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tahukah kalian siapa yang pertama kali mencapai naungan Allah pada Hari Kiamat?' Mereka berkata: 'Allah dan Rasul-Nya lebih mengetahui.' Beliau bersabda: 'Mereka yang, ketika diberikan hak mereka, menerimanya; ketika diminta memberikan hak, memberikannya; dan yang menghakimi orang lain sebagaimana mereka menghakimi diri mereka sendiri.'

206.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Urwa said to her: 'O mother's sister, I am not surprised by your knowledge of poetry and history, but I am amazed by your knowledge of medicine — how did you acquire it?' She struck his shoulder and said: 'O Urwa, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to fall ill toward the end of his life. Delegations of Arabs would come from all directions and prescribe treatments for him. I would prepare them for him, and that is how I learned.'
206.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Urwa berkata kepadanya: 'Wahai bibi dari pihak ibu, aku tidak heran dengan pengetahuanmu tentang puisi dan sejarah, tetapi aku kagum dengan pengetahuanmu tentang kedokteran — dari mana kamu mendapatkannya?' Ia menepuk bahunya dan berkata: 'Wahai Urwa, Rasulullah ﷺ biasa jatuh sakit menjelang akhir hidupnya. Delegasi-delegasi Arab datang dari segala penjuru dan meresepkan pengobatan untuknya. Aku yang mempersiapkannya untuknya, dan dari situlah aku belajar.'

207.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Indeed, Allah and His angels send blessings upon those who complete the rows [in prayer].'
207.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya Allah dan para malaikat-Nya bershalawat atas orang-orang yang menyempurnakan shaf [dalam shalat].'

208.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray while wrapped in a garment, part of which was over me.'
208.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat sementara berselimutkan kain, sebagian di antaranya di atasku.'

209.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), Mother of the Believers, that she said: 'We asked permission from the Prophet ﷺ to participate in jihad. He said: "Your jihad — or sufficient for you — is the Hajj."'
209.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), Ummul Mukminin, bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami meminta izin dari Nabi ﷺ untuk ikut jihad. Beliau bersabda: "Jihad kalian — atau cukup bagi kalian — adalah Haji."'

210.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Pray in the Hijr [the semi-circular area adjacent to the Kaaba], for your people fell short in building the House when they built it.'
210.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Shalatlah di Hijr [area setengah lingkaran yang berdampingan dengan Ka'bah], karena kaummu kurang dalam membangun Ka'bah ketika mereka membangunnya.'

211.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Prayer time can find me in a state of major impurity while wanting to fast, so I bathe and then fast.' A man said: 'We are not like you — Allah has forgiven all your past and future sins.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ became angry and said: 'By Allah, I hope to be the most God-fearing of you and the most knowledgeable about what I should avoid.'
211.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Waktu shalat dapat menemuiku dalam keadaan junub sementara aku ingin berpuasa, maka aku mandi lalu berpuasa.' Seorang pria berkata: 'Kami tidak sepertimu — Allah telah mengampuni semua dosa masa lalumu dan masa depanmu.' Rasulullah ﷺ marah dan bersabda: 'Demi Allah, aku berharap menjadi yang paling bertakwa di antara kalian dan yang paling berpengetahuan tentang apa yang harus aku jauhi.'

212.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ asked a man who came to help: 'Do you believe in Allah and His Messenger?' He said: 'No.' He said: 'We do not seek the help of a polytheist.' The man then said on a second occasion: 'Do you believe in Allah and His Messenger?' He said: 'Yes.' So he went with him.
212.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bertanya kepada seorang pria yang datang untuk membantu: 'Apakah kamu beriman kepada Allah dan Rasul-Nya?' Ia berkata: 'Tidak.' Beliau bersabda: 'Kami tidak meminta bantuan orang musyrik.' Kemudian pria itu berkata pada kesempatan kedua: 'Apakah kamu beriman kepada Allah dan Rasul-Nya?' Ia berkata: 'Ya.' Maka ia pergi bersamanya.

213.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ, while performing ablution, raised his gaze to her and said: 'You are from me and I am from you.' He was asked on the pulpit: 'Who are the best of people?' He said: 'Those who are most knowledgeable in the religion of Allah and most caring of their relatives.'
213.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ, saat berwudhu, mengangkat pandangannya ke arahnya dan berkata: 'Kamu dariku dan aku darimu.' Beliau ditanya di atas mimbar: 'Siapakah orang-orang terbaik?' Beliau bersabda: 'Mereka yang paling berpengetahuan dalam agama Allah dan paling memperhatikan kerabat mereka.'

214.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would fast until we said he would never break the fast, and he would break the fast until we said he would never fast. He used to recite every night Surah Bani Isra'il [al-Isra] and al-Zumar.'
214.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ berpuasa hingga kami berkata beliau tidak akan pernah berbuka, dan berbuka hingga kami berkata beliau tidak akan pernah berpuasa. Beliau biasa membaca setiap malam Surah Bani Isra'il [al-Isra] dan al-Zumar.'

215.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would not perform ablution after bathing.'
215.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ tidak berwudhu setelah mandi.'

216.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'In the first twenty nights [of Ramadan], the Prophet ﷺ would mix sleep and prayer. But when the [last] ten nights arrived, he would strive earnestly and tighten his waist wrapper.'
216.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Pada dua puluh malam pertama [Ramadan], Nabi ﷺ mencampur tidur dan shalat. Tetapi ketika sepuluh [malam terakhir] tiba, beliau bersungguh-sungguh dan mengencangkan kain pinggangnya.'

217.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'We did it once and bathed' — meaning the one who has intercourse without ejaculation.
217.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami melakukannya sekali dan mandi' — maksudnya orang yang berhubungan intim tanpa ejakulasi.

218.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to say: 'O Allah, You have made my physical form good, so make my character good.'
218.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa berdoa: 'Ya Allah, Engkau telah membuat bentuk fisikku baik, maka jadikanlah akhlakku baik.'

219.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Stay in your homes, for that is your jihad.'
219.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Tetaplah di rumah-rumah kalian, karena itulah jihad kalian.'

220.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'This world is lush and sweet. Whoever receives something from it from us in a wholesome way, with wholesome wealth, without greed — it will be blessed for him. But whoever receives something from it in an unwholesome way, with unwholesome wealth, and with greed — it will not be blessed for him.'
220.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Dunia ini hijau dan manis. Barangsiapa yang menerima sesuatu darinya dari kami dengan cara yang baik, dengan harta yang baik, tanpa keserakahan — itu akan diberkahi baginya. Tetapi barangsiapa yang menerimanya dengan cara yang tidak baik, dengan harta yang tidak baik, dan dengan keserakahan — itu tidak akan diberkahi baginya.'

221.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to allocate for her a day among his wives, and Khadija was the first woman he married after her [i.e., before the others].
221.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa mengalokasikan untuknya sehari di antara istri-istrinya, dan Khadijah adalah wanita pertama yang beliau nikahi sebelum yang lainnya.

222.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet's ﷺ companions entered to visit him while ill and stood up. He motioned to them to sit. When he finished his prayer, he said: 'The imam is to be followed. When he says the takbir, say the takbir; when he bows, bow; when he prays seated, pray seated; and when he prays standing, pray standing.'
222.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa para sahabat Nabi ﷺ masuk untuk mengunjunginya saat sakit dan berdiri. Beliau memberi isyarat kepada mereka untuk duduk. Ketika selesai shalat, beliau bersabda: 'Imam ditetapkan untuk diikuti. Ketika ia bertakbir, bertakbirlah; ketika ia ruku, rukuklah; ketika ia shalat sambil duduk, shalatlah sambil duduk; dan ketika ia shalat sambil berdiri, shalatlah sambil berdiri.'

223.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to rest his head in my lap while I was menstruating and recite the Quran.'
223.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa meletakkan kepalanya di pangkuanku sementara aku sedang haid dan membaca Al-Quran.'

224.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Do you know who will be the first to reach the shade of Allah on the Day of Resurrection?' They said: 'Allah Almighty and His Messenger ﷺ know best.' He said: 'Those who, when given rights, accept them; when asked for rights, give them; and who judge for people as they judge for themselves.'
224.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tahukah kalian siapa yang pertama kali mencapai naungan Allah pada Hari Kiamat?' Mereka berkata: 'Allah Yang Maha Agung dan Rasul-Nya ﷺ lebih mengetahui.' Beliau bersabda: 'Mereka yang, ketika diberikan hak, menerimanya; ketika diminta memberikan hak, memberikannya; dan yang menghakimi orang lain sebagaimana mereka menghakimi diri mereka sendiri.'

225.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that someone said: 'O Messenger of Allah, so-and-so has died and is now at rest.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ became angry and said: 'Only the one who enters Paradise finds rest' — Qutaybah said: 'or the one who is forgiven.'
225.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seseorang berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, si fulan telah meninggal dan kini beristirahat.' Rasulullah ﷺ marah dan bersabda: 'Hanya orang yang masuk surga yang beristirahat' — Qutaibah berkata: 'atau orang yang diampuni.'

226.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'Nothing of this world ever impressed the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, nor did any person impress him, except one who possessed God-consciousness.'
226.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Tidak ada sesuatu pun dari dunia ini yang pernah membuat Rasulullah ﷺ terkesan, dan tidak pula seseorang, kecuali orang yang memiliki ketakwaan.'

227.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about one who dies with outstanding fasts. He said: 'His guardian should fast on his behalf.'
227.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang seseorang yang meninggal dengan puasa yang belum terlaksana. Beliau bersabda: 'Walinya harus berpuasa atas namanya.'

228.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever dies with outstanding fasts — his guardian should fast on his behalf.'
228.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang meninggal dengan puasa yang belum terlaksana — walinya harus berpuasa atas namanya.'

229.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'Nothing of this world ever impressed the Prophet ﷺ, nor did anything of this world impress him, unless there was God-consciousness in it.'
229.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Tidak ada sesuatu pun dari dunia ini yang pernah membuat Nabi ﷺ terkesan, dan tidak ada sesuatu pun dari dunia ini yang mengesankan beliau, kecuali jika ada ketakwaan di dalamnya.'

230.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day should not harm his neighbor; whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day should say good things or remain silent; and whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day should honor his guest.'
230.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang beriman kepada Allah dan Hari Akhir, janganlah ia menyakiti tetangganya; barangsiapa yang beriman kepada Allah dan Hari Akhir, hendaklah ia berkata baik atau diam; dan barangsiapa yang beriman kepada Allah dan Hari Akhir, hendaklah ia memuliakan tamunya.'

231.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a man swore by Allah that he would not reduce a debt owed to him. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said three times: 'He has sworn not to do good.' The creditor then came and said: 'By my father and mother, if you wish I will forgive what is short, or if you wish, take from the principal what you like.' And he forgave the shortfall.
231.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang pria bersumpah demi Allah bahwa ia tidak akan mengurangi hutang yang ada padanya. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda tiga kali: 'Ia telah bersumpah untuk tidak berbuat kebaikan.' Kemudian si pemberi hutang datang dan berkata: 'Demi ayah dan ibuku, jika kamu mau aku akan memaafkan kekurangannya, atau jika kamu mau, ambillah dari pokoknya sekehendakmu.' Dan ia memaafkan kekurangannya.

232.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Do not prevent the female servants of Allah from the mosques of Allah, and let them go out without perfume.' Aisha said: 'If he had seen their state today, he would have prevented them.'
232.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jangan halangi hamba-hamba wanita Allah dari masjid-masjid Allah, dan biarkanlah mereka keluar tanpa memakai wewangian.' Aisyah berkata: 'Jika beliau melihat kondisi mereka sekarang, beliau pasti akan melarang mereka.'

233.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Do not sell your fruits until their ripeness appears and they are safe from blight.'
233.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Jangan jual buah-buahan kalian hingga kematangannya tampak dan aman dari penyakit.'

234.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to a man who stated he did not kiss his children: 'I can do nothing if Allah has removed mercy from your heart.'
234.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepada seorang pria yang menyatakan ia tidak mencium anak-anaknya: 'Aku tidak bisa berbuat apa-apa jika Allah telah mencabut rahmat dari hatimu.'

235.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to make seven takbirs in the first rak'ah of the two Eid prayers and five in the last rak'ah, besides the two takbirs of bowing.
235.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa melakukan tujuh takbir pada rakaat pertama dari dua shalat Eid dan lima pada rakaat terakhir, selain dua takbir ruku.

236.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to remember Allah at all times.'
236.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mengingat Allah di setiap saat.'

237.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked: 'When the Prophet ﷺ had major impurity and washed his head, was that sufficient, or did he pour water over his head?' She said: 'Rather, he used to pour water over his head.'
237.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya: 'Ketika Nabi ﷺ dalam keadaan junub dan mencuci kepalanya, apakah itu cukup, atau apakah beliau menuangkan air di atas kepalanya?' Ia berkata: 'Beliau biasa menuangkan air di atas kepalanya.'

238.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I asked the Prophet ﷺ about turning to look during prayer. He said: "It is a snatching that Shaytan snatches from the servant's prayer."'
238.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ tentang menoleh ke samping dalam shalat. Beliau bersabda: "Itu adalah rampasan yang Setan rampas dari shalat seorang hamba."'

239.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ prayed while wearing a garment, part of which was over me.'
239.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ shalat dengan mengenakan pakaian, sebagian di antaranya di atasku.'

240.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever is entrusted by Allah with some matter of the Muslims and desires good for them — Allah will appoint for him a sincere aide. If he forgets, the aide reminds him; and if he remembers, the aide helps him.'
240.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang Allah amanahkan dengan suatu urusan kaum Muslimin dan ia menginginkan kebaikan bagi mereka — Allah akan menunjuk untuknya seorang pembantu yang jujur. Jika ia lupa, pembantu itu mengingatkannya; dan jika ia ingat, pembantu itu membantunya.'

241.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'O Aisha, beware of the sins that are considered trivial, for they have someone from Allah who will demand account for them.'
241.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Wahai Aisyah, berhati-hatilah dari dosa-dosa yang dianggap sepele, karena ada seseorang dari Allah yang akan meminta pertanggungjawaban atasnya.'

242.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ as he was dying. Beside him was a bowl of water. He would dip his hand into it, wipe his face with it, and say: "O Allah, help me through the agonies of death."'
242.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ saat beliau menjelang wafat. Di sampingnya ada sebuah mangkuk berisi air. Beliau mencelupkan tangannya ke dalamnya, mengusap wajahnya dengan air itu, dan berdoa: "Ya Allah, bantulah aku melewati kepedihan sakaratul maut."'

243.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Indeed, those who make these images will be punished on the Day of Resurrection. It will be said to them: "Give life to what you created."'
243.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang membuat gambar-gambar ini akan disiksa pada Hari Kiamat. Akan dikatakan kepada mereka: "Hidupkanlah apa yang telah kalian ciptakan."'

244.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when she instructed a servant to give something to a poor person, the Prophet ﷺ said to her: 'O Aisha, do not count what you give, lest Allah count against you.'
244.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ia memerintahkan seorang pembantu untuk memberikan sesuatu kepada orang miskin, Nabi ﷺ berkata kepadanya: 'Wahai Aisyah, jangan menghitung apa yang kamu berikan, agar Allah tidak menghitung terhadapmu.'

245.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'This world is the home of one who has no home, and the wealth of one who has no wealth. Only the one who has no sense gathers for it.'
245.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Dunia ini adalah rumah bagi orang yang tidak memiliki rumah, dan harta bagi orang yang tidak memiliki harta. Hanya orang yang tidak berakal yang mengumpulkan untuknya.'

246.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked whether fire was ever lit in the houses of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. She said: 'O nephew, on what would we live? We lived on the two black things — dates and water.'
246.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya apakah api pernah dinyalakan di rumah-rumah Rasulullah ﷺ. Ia berkata: 'Wahai keponakanku, di atas apa kami hidup? Kami hidup dari dua hal hitam — kurma dan air.'

247.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'By Allah, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ never saw a sieve and never ate sifted bread from the time Allah sent him as a Prophet until he was taken.' Someone asked: 'How did you eat barley?' She said: 'We would say "ugh" [expressing the roughness of it].'
247.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Demi Allah, Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah melihat ayakan dan tidak pernah makan roti yang diayak sejak Allah mengutusnya sebagai Nabi hingga beliau wafat.' Seseorang bertanya: 'Bagaimana kalian makan gandum?' Ia berkata: 'Kami mengucapkan "ugh" [mengekspresikan kekasarannya].'

248.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), Mother of the Believers, that she said: 'O Messenger of Allah, should we not go out and participate in jihad with you?' He said: 'No, your jihad is an accepted Hajj, and it is your jihad.'
248.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), Ummul Mukminin, bahwa ia berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, tidakkah kami keluar dan ikut jihad bersamamu?' Beliau bersabda: 'Tidak, jihad kalian adalah haji mabrur, dan itulah jihad kalian.'

249.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding alcoholic drinks: if a large quantity of something intoxicates, then even a handful of it is forbidden.
249.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai minuman keras: jika jumlah yang banyak dari sesuatu memabukkan, maka bahkan segenggam darinya pun haram.

250.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I missed him one night and found him at al-Baqi'. He said: "Peace be upon you, O abode of a believing people. You have preceded us, and we shall join you. O Allah, do not deprive us of their reward and do not put us to trial after them."' — meaning the Prophet ﷺ.
250.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku tidak menemukannya di suatu malam dan mendapatinya di al-Baqi'. Beliau mengucapkan: "Salam atasmu, wahai tempat tinggal kaum yang beriman. Kalian mendahului kami, dan kami akan menyusul kalian. Ya Allah, jangan halangi kami dari pahala mereka dan jangan uji kami setelah mereka."' — maksudnya Nabi ﷺ.
